title: hieracium polyanthemum
intro: Hieracium polyanthemum, also known as hawkweed, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the dandelion family and is characterized by its yellow flowers and bitter taste. Traditionally, Hieracium polyanthemum has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly as a liver and kidney tonic, and to treat digestive issues such as constipation and indigestion. The plant's health benefits include antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Hieracium polyanthemum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or dried herb for use in herbal remedies.
